---
title: "RQ1 — Flood attribution"
---

> **Status: pending W7.** Assembled once `pipelines/floods/attribution.py` produces
> the decomposition series.

**Question (`docs/PRODUCT.md` §5).** How much of the 2026 flood is rainfall-driven
versus driven by upstream dam releases? Discriminated with CHIRPS rainfall and
GloFAS discharge against reported Euphrates flows.

Planned figure: a rainfall-vs-discharge time series across the March–June 2026
window with the late-May Euphrates surge marked, built with `seaborn`/`matplotlib`
via `viz`.

::: {.callout-note}
Attribution is provisional and carries explicit uncertainty
(`viz.CAVEATS["attribution"]`). Keep causal claims proportionate to evidence
(`docs/PRODUCT.md` §9).
:::

<!-- TODO(W7): plot CHIRPS vs GloFAS series; state confidence bounds + caveats. -->
